description: gh-roadmap board custom fields. roadmap_bootstrap.sh creates them idempotently on a fresh board (skips if already present). If the golden template is cloned with copyProjectV2 they are already there, so this passes idempotently. color is the GitHub single-select allowed enum: GRAY BLUE GREEN YELLOW ORANGE RED PINK PURPLE.

fields.name: Horizon

options.name: Mid-term
options.description: Epic — month/sprint scale (sub-issue of a Long-term item)

options.name: Short-term
options.description: Task — day/week scale (sub-issue of a Mid-term item)

fields.note: 3-tier roadmap horizon. The hierarchy itself is expressed with native sub-issues; this field is for Roadmap view group/filter.

fields.name: Start Date
fields.note: Start of the Roadmap view bar. ★ Must be paired with Target Date (end) for a duration bar to be drawn — filling only Target Date shows just a dot/short bar (measured 2026-06-21). Both must be connected in the UI 'Set date fields' (date field connection is not possible via the API).

fields.name: Target Date
fields.note: End of the bar in the Roadmap layout view — target ship date (BP#5 'Date field for target ship dates'). Forms a duration bar paired with Start Date. If cards have no dates the Roadmap view looks empty (common trap).

native_fields.Status: Already exists on the default board. roadmap_bootstrap does not align its options to config.status_options here (option additions are a short-term execution-column concern defined by a human in the template — the default Todo/In Progress/Done also works).
native_fields.Milestone: ★ Native auto-synced field — Projects automatically reflects the issue milestone (BP#10). No custom creation needed. The board can group/filter by Milestone. Note milestones are repo-scoped (no cross-repo).
native_fields.Iteration: The ITERATION field is created only when config.iteration=true (BP#5 velocity planning). For cross-repo timeboxing use this field or Target Date (since milestones cannot cross repos).
